pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 67/67 WINs reviewed + 4/~25 sections reviewed (SEC-3.1, SEC-3.2, SEC-3.3, SEC-3.5.1). Phase 1 WIN review complete. Section review ongoing. Digest shows 56 pending reviews (including sections); 16 processed this run (5 new + 11 prior).

issues.observation: Latest report (2026-04-06) shows overall_status=warn. Two major issues (showTab('details') dead links, #part4c broken anchor) were already fixed in ISS-033 and ISS-034. Five broken external links partially fixed in ISS-032. Two remain unfixed: LPI Apollo 11 LRR (404) and CUORE (expired SSL). Tracked in ISS-049.

All 67 WINs reviewed. Curmudgeon now reviewing sections. No stalled progress. Digest shows 9 under-covered processed reviews with 14 missing holes — these are from early processing before the mandatory self-check rule was enforced.
issues.action_needed: Address under-covered reviews in future decider runs.

internal_issues.description: Hubble tension (local vs CMB H₀) not addressed — dome may exploit real open question
